title: Oil prices rise after report of Iranian attack on commercial ships in Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: Brent and U.S. crude futures rose after a report of an Iranian attack on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: Brent and U.S. crude futures rose after a report of an Iranian attack on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
